creator: citric@cubicone.tmetic.com
text:
On 8/22/12 9:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-Regexp-Grammars,
>
> Please note that PR ports/170871 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170871
>

I approve. Thanks for the patch!
